creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 164915
svn diff to fix dns/dns_balance

This port is currently marked BROKEN (unfetchable)
The attached svn diff fixes that.

- Provides permanent home for the source
- Renames && repacks source file, for better integration
into the ports(7) system
- Provides working WWW
- Redresses pkg-descr

That's it!

Thanks, and Happy New Year!

--Chris
